body:
Following up on your note from last week about the [Halfway Capital](vc/halfway-capital) portfolio review — I wanted to share some thoughts on the climate infrastructure thesis before our call on Thursday. I've been spending time with a few teams working at the intersection of grid optimization and distributed compute, and I think there's a real signal emerging around demand-response software that's worth discussing. One company in particular has caught my attention: they're doing load-balancing for AI training workloads in a way that could meaningfully reduce curtailment on renewable grids. I'd love to get your perspective on where Halfway is thinking about that space, especially given your Series-A focus. Would it make sense to loop in the team before Thursday, or should we keep the initial conversation tighter? Let me know what works best.

— Sarah
